title: Bind Captain evidence to action and target digests
goal: Add deterministic action/target digest binding for Captain evidence so review, CI, human authorization, execution authority, and status projection can be tied to the exact requested high-impact envelope.

acceptance.assertion: Captain preflight computes a deterministic actions_sha256 over normalized requested actions.
Each Captain action exposes a deterministic target_sha256 in its receipt.
Review, CI, human authorization, execution authority, and status projection evidence can be checked against action or target digests and mismatches fail closed.

metadata.reason: PR #97 validates structure but does not cryptographically bind all evidence objects to the requested action envelope.
